verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is all I need, He is all I need, Jesus is all I need. He is all I need, He is all I need, Jesus is all I need.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will worship Him, I will worship Him, In Spirit and in truth. I will worship Him, I will worship Him, In Spirit and in truth.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will take Him now, I will take Him now, For all that I need. I will take Him now, I will take Him now, For all that I need.
